7 September 1987
Sultan's Pool, Jerusalem, Israel

Master>CDr(x)>EAC(secure)>FLAC(level8)>Dime

CD1 61:17.19

1. The Times They Are A-Changin' [5:11.18]
2. Man Of Peace [3:48.71]
3. Like A Rolling Stone [5:34.28]
4. Rainy Day Women #12&35 [2:37.47]
5. Emotionally Yours [4:48.03]
6. Shot Of Love [5:04.24]
7. Ballad Of A Thin Man [5:35.44]
8. You're A Big Girl Now [5:18.16]
9. John Brown [4:52.08]
10. License To Kill [4:32.07]
11. It's All Over Now, Baby Blue [5:56.12]
12. Gotta Serve Somebody [4:37.01]
13. Slow Train [3:17.30]
14. (audience) [0:04.10] 

Complete Dylan set.

Power put a premature end to the show...
